tagline: New builds, renovations, and dependable pool care across Gauteng.
short_description: Pool construction, renovation, repairs and care across Gauteng.
long_description: Ma Pools Construction is a Gauteng-based, owner-operated pool care firm serving high-end private residences across Gauteng, Gauteng, Gauteng, Houghton, Meadowlands, Waterfall, Gauteng project, Pretoria, Centurion and surrounding suburbs. Operating since 2014, the firm provides weekly maintenance, precision water-chemistry balancing, technical equipment repairs, professional acid washes, and eco-efficient equipment upgrades.

core_services.name: Pool Construction & Renovation
core_services.summary: weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment health checks.

core_services.name: Crystal Clarity System
core_services.summary: Proprietary 12-point chemical balancing protocol with UV-C sanitation calibration.

core_services.name: Technical Repairs
core_services.summary: Specialist troubleshooting for pumps, hydraulics, leak detection, and chlorinators.

core_services.name: Pool Equipment & Plumbing
core_services.summary: Controlled chemical treatment that revitalises aging plaster and removes deep stains in 48 hours.

core_services.name: Paving, Tiling & General Construction
core_services.summary: Variable-speed pumps and UV sterilisers reduce electricity costs by up to 70%.

core_services.name: Pool Services & Maintenance
core_services.summary: Fully managed monthly service with 24/7 priority emergency support and Gold Certification.

core_services.name: Structural Integrity Inspections
core_services.summary: Periodic audits of plaster, tiling, hydraulics, and load-bearing pool elements.
